title: Track Content Performance
prompt:
Check engagement metrics on our published content.

1. Use the typefully connection to GET /drafts and filter for published posts in the last 30 days. For each, record likes, retweets, comments, and views.

2. Use the devto connection to GET /articles/me/published. For each article published in the last 30 days, record positive_reactions_count, comments_count, and page_views_count.

Store each post in content-performance using store_content_performance with platform, post_id, title, url, published_at, and the engagement metrics. Update existing entries.

Summarize: total posts tracked, total engagement, top 3 performing posts.
